final:
module shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire load,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            q <= data_in;  // Load new data
        end else begin
            q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};  // Shift left
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (load) begin
        q <= ~data_in;
      end else begin
        q <= {~q[2:0], 1'b1};
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
